steps.title: Backsolve with 24
steps.content:
Backsolving with $24$:
$$\text{Total markers} = \text{green} + \text{orange} = 24 + 24 = 48$$
Since the problem states there are 32 markers total, $48 \ne 32$, so this test fails.

steps.title: Backsolve with 8
steps.content:
Testing $8$:
$$\text{Total markers} = 24 + 8 = 32$$
This matches the given total of 32 markers.
A is correct.
